since_last: 70% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.48% · BTC +3.17% · Gold +2.28% · Nasdaq100 +1.30%. 70% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.97%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.97%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -25.67%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +16.38%, OKTA +10.07%, CRWD +9.75%, ZS +8.54%, DELL +7.64%. Laggards: IBM -25.67%, ARM -5.68%, ISRG -5.43%, BIDU -4.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.98% at $141.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
